ddls:
CREATE TABLE "app_usage" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each app usage record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID */,
  "session_time" REAL /* Time spent on the app in the session */,
  "in_app_purchases" REAL /* Total in-app purchases made by the user */,
  "push_notifications" INTEGER /* Whether the user has push notifications enabled */,
  "in_app_messages" INTEGER /* Whether the user has received in-app messages */,
  "screen_views" INTEGER /* Number of screen views in the session */,
  "button_clicks" INTEGER /* Number of button clicks in the session */,
  "search_queries" INTEGER /* Number of search queries in the session */,
  "average_session_time" REAL /* Average time spent on the app per session */,
  "total_sessions" INTEGER /* Total number of sessions */,
  "last_session_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "push_notifications" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each push notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "opened_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was opened */,
  "clicked_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was clicked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "in_app_messages" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each in-app message */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "message_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the message */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Text of the message */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was sent */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_recommendations" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "content_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the content */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of the content (e.g., article, video, product) */,
  "recommended_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was recommended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_dashboard" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "dashboard_type" TEXT /* Type of the dashboard (e.g., user acquisition, retention, revenue) */,
  "metrics" TEXT /* Metrics displayed on the dashboard */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data for the metrics */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "export_type" TEXT /* Type of the export (e.g., CSV, Excel, JSON) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data exported */,
  "exported_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was exported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
